description_of_loss: On 02/13/2025, construction work being performed by Consolidated Freight Lines Inc. at 7700 Mineral Drive, Suite 200, Coeur d'Alene, ID 83815 caused damage to our insured's adjacent property at 1100 N. Meridian Street, Oklahoma City, OK 73107. The damage resulted from excessive vibration from pile driving during the construction process.
